about.description-1: We connect Kepulauan Sula's rich ocean harvest with partners around the world, supplying premium tuna with sustainable, traceable practices.
about.description-2: From sourcing to export, our team keeps quality, safety, and timely delivery at the center of every shipment.

footer.social-description: Follow our journey as we grow Indonesia's seafood exports and strengthen partnerships across the globe.
footer.copyright: © Copyright 2026 PT Sula Seafood Indonesia. All rights reserved.

hero-section.title: Connecting Kepulauan Sula's Ocean Harvest to Every Market
hero-section.description: We supply fresh and processed tuna that meets international standards. Our focus is delivering quality products with care and precision.

commitment-section.title: Our commitment
commitment-section.description: We deliver premium tuna with uncompromising quality. Our network spans the North Maluku archipelago, bringing Sula's finest catch to global markets.

catalog-section.title: Our premium tuna selection
catalog-section.subtitle: Explore our carefully curated tuna range

yellowfin.title: A fast-growing tropical tuna commonly found in Indonesian waters
yellowfin.desc: Firm, bright red flesh with a clean flavor, excellent for sashimi, steaks, or grilling

bigeye.title: A deep-water tuna species known for its high fat content
bigeye.desc: Rich, buttery meat with a soft texture, highly prized for premium sashimi and sushi

albacore.title: A migratory tuna species recognized by its long pectoral fins
albacore.desc: Light pink to white flesh with a mild flavor and tender flakes, ideal for searing or canning

trust-section.title: Built on Care
trust-section.description: Though newly established, our process is rooted in careful selection, hands-on quality control, and responsible tuna sourcing

certifications.label: Certifications
certifications.title: Certified handling
certifications.description: Our facility has implemented HACCP-based handling procedures, helping us maintain safe and consistent tuna processing practices.

quality.label: Quality
quality.title: Careful handling
quality.description: We maintain freshness from landing to shipment through proper icing, temperature control, and careful handling at every step.

standards.label: Standards
standards.title: Consistent processing practices
standards.description: Our operations follow established sanitation and handling procedures to support reliable supply and product condition for partners.

cta-section.title: Ready to explore our products?
cta-section.description: Connect with our team to discuss your tuna requirements and discover our premium selection.

header-section.title: Fresh Selection
header-section.description: A curated selection of premium tuna sourced from Kepulauan Sula. We currently specialize exclusively in tuna species, handled with care to preserve freshness, texture, and natural flavor.
header-section.imageAlt: Tuna products from PT Sula Seafood Indonesia

catalog-section.title: Our product catalog
catalog-section.description: Carefully prepared tuna products ready for distribution to restaurants, retailers, and international buyers.

product-specs-section.title: Detailed specifications for premium selections
product-specs-section.description: Technical details for our tuna products, including handling methods, condition, and quality characteristics. Every product is processed under strict temperature control to preserve freshness, natural color, and texture.

quality-section.title: Our processing and handling
quality-section.description: Our tuna is received from local fishing areas and handled through controlled cleaning, grading, and storage procedures. Proper temperature management is maintained during processing to help preserve freshness and product condition.

standards.label: Cold Chain
standards.title: Maintained cold chain
standards.description: Proper chilling and freezing procedures are applied to keep the tuna at stable temperatures, protecting flavor and shelf life.

certifications.label: Handling
certifications.title: Careful handling from catch to processing
certifications.description: Each tuna is handled immediately after landing and maintained under controlled temperatures to preserve freshness, color, and texture.

quality.label: Quality
quality.title: Consistent product quality
quality.description: We inspect every fish for appearance, firmness, and condition to ensure clean meat and reliable grading across all tuna species.

cta-section.title: Contact Us
cta-section.description: Contact us for more information about our tuna products, availability, and specifications.

header-section.title: About PT Sula Seafood Indonesia
header-section.description: A trusted seafood trading company delivering premium fish from the rich waters of Indonesia to global markets with precision and commitment.

company.title: About the Company
company.description: PT Sula Seafood Indonesia is a tuna handling and supply company based in Indonesia. We work with local fishing communities to source yellowfin, bigeye, and albacore tuna from nearby fishing grounds.

operations.title: Our Operations
operations.description: After landing, the tuna is cleaned, graded, and stored under controlled temperatures. We focus on proper handling practices to maintain product condition, color, and texture.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: We emphasize consistent handling, clear product grading, and transparent communication with buyers. Our goal is to provide reliable tuna products with dependable quality.

facilities-section.title: Our processing and distribution network
facilities-section.description: Our operations are based at a dedicated site supporting the handling and storage of tuna products. The facility provides organized working areas and temperature-controlled storage, allowing products to be maintained in stable condition from arrival to dispatch.

facility.label: Facility
facility.title: Operational facility
facility.description: We operate from a working site used for handling and preparing tuna products.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.title: Working areas
workspace.description: Designated areas are available for product handling and organization.

storage.label: Storage
storage.title: Temperature-controlled storage
storage.description: Cold storage is used to keep tuna under stable temperature conditions.

inquire-section.title: Contact Us
inquire-section.description: We welcome your questions and product inquiries.
